positive: A detailed, whimsical illustration of a stylized crescent moon and a cluster of glowing, ethereal stars forming a vibrant constellation map. The stars are depicted as various geometric shapes (triangles, circles, diamonds) interconnected by glowing, delicate lines of cosmic dust. The overall style is neo-Art Nouveau mixed with modern celestial fantasy, using a limited palette of deep indigo, luminous gold, pearl white, and subtle turquoise. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing strong negative space around the main cosmic elements for high contrast and excellent print scalability. The style should have clean, vector-like lines and a palpable sense of glowing energy, suitable for apparel printing on dark fabric.
negative: blurry, messy, artifacts, grain, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, jpeg artifacts, amateur drawing, photorealism
